Who I Am

I am a Fullstack Developer & AI/ML/Data Engineer from Benin, West Africa. I design and build intelligent digital solutions that solve real-world problems — from web applications to machine learning models and data pipelines.

Self-taught and endlessly curious, I continuously learn and adopt the latest technologies. Every project is an opportunity to innovate, push boundaries, and deliver work that exceeds expectations.

Kajarnak Tech — Innovation at the Core

Kajarnak Tech is the freelance agency I founded to deliver high-quality digital solutions worldwide. Whether you need a web application, an AI system, or data insights, Kajarnak Tech brings expertise, reliability, and competitive value to every project.

💻

Fullstack Development

Modern web & mobile applications with React, Next.js, Node.js. Responsive interfaces, robust APIs, and scalable architectures built for growth.

🤖

Artificial Intelligence

Chatbots, AI assistants, classification models, prediction engines, and NLP solutions. We integrate AI into your workflows to automate decisions.

📊

Data Science & Analytics

Exploratory analysis, data visualization, predictive models, and ML pipelines. Turn your raw data into actionable insights that drive results.

👁️

Computer Vision

CNN models, object detection, image recognition, and real-time video analysis. Solutions for healthcare, agriculture, security, and more.

⚡

Automation & DevOps

CI/CD pipelines, automated deployment, and workflow automation. Ship faster with confidence and reduce manual overhead.

Freelance Services

Why Hire Kajarnak Tech

Reliable, skilled, and committed — we deliver results that matter.

Your Project Deserves an Agency That Cares

Kajarnak Tech is not just a service provider — we are your partner in success. From the first conversation to post-launch support, we are fully invested in delivering a solution that works for you.

Let's Talk About Your Project
01

Real Expertise

We don't just follow tutorials — we build production-ready solutions. Our projects (KajarnakAI, SmartFarm, MedScan-AI) prove we deliver complex AI and web systems from concept to deployment.

02

Transparent Communication

No surprises, no ghosting. You get regular updates, clear timelines, and honest feedback. We communicate in English or French — whichever you prefer.

03

End-to-End Delivery

We handle everything — design, development, testing, deployment, and documentation. One agency, one vision, one reliable delivery.

04

Competitive Value

Based in West Africa, we offer world-class quality at competitive rates. Same expertise as expensive agencies, with personal attention and faster turnaround.

05

Post-Launch Support

We don't disappear after delivery. Every project includes a support period. Need changes or fixes? We are just a message away on WhatsApp or email.

06

Proven Track Record

5 open-source projects on GitHub, real-world AI applications in healthcare and agriculture. Our work speaks for itself.

How It Works

Our Process

1

Discovery Call

Free consultation to understand your needs, goals, and timeline. No commitment, just a conversation.

2

Proposal & Planning

Detailed proposal with scope, deliverables, timeline, and a clear roadmap. You know exactly what to expect.

3

Build & Iterate

Agile development with regular progress updates. You see the work evolve and provide feedback at every step.

4

Launch & Support

Deployment with full documentation. Post-launch support included so you are never left alone.
